debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq α
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at *
    obtain ⟨hl_bound, hr_bound, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv_mem⟩ := h
    by_cases hv : v = label
    · simp [hv, beq_iff_eq]
      cases hv_mem <;> simp [*]
    · simp [beq_iff_eq, hv]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hl_ord]
        constructor
        · intro; assumption
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl h => exact h
          | inr h =>
            have : v ≤ label := hr_bound label h
            omega
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hr_ord]
        constructor
        · intro; assumption
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl h =>
            have : label ≤ v := hl_bound label h
            omega
          | inr h => exact h
